title: Guests can't perform create items on boards through my app if there are a blocked column
excerpt: Guests can’t perform create items on boards through my app if there are a blocked column. When the board is fully open, the guest can create items. When there are only one column blocked, the guest can’t create items trh…

posts.author: drcproengenharia (DRCPro)
posts.cookedHtml: Guests can’t perform create items on boards through my app if there are a blocked column. When the board is fully open, the guest can create items. When there are only one column blocked, the guest can’t create items trhough my app.
